S1_avatar.original_prompt: Turn my selfie into a 90s high school yearbook photo
S1_avatar.rewritten_prompt:
### Scene
1990s American high school yearbook portrait photo, transforming the uploaded selfie.

### Subject
* Gender/age/identity: preserve exactly from input selfie
* Hair, glasses, facial structure: unchanged from input
* Expression: warm, natural smile with teeth showing
* Clothing: navy blue crew-neck sweater with a plaid button-up shirt collar peeking out
* Pose: head-and-shoulders, centered, slight head tilt

### Environment
* Background: iconic 90s yearbook laser-beam backdrop — vivid neon beams of cyan, electric blue, and hot magenta radiating outward from behind the subject against deep cobalt blue gradient

### Lighting
* Source: dual umbrella flash at 45° left and right
* Quality: soft, even illumination with gentle catch-lights in eyes
* White balance (K): 4800 (warm tungsten shift)

### Camera
* Film stock: Kodak Gold 200 — warm color shift, subtle film grain, slightly desaturated reds
* Focal length: 85mm portrait lens
* Aperture: f/5.6 (moderate depth of field)
* Aspect ratio: 1:1 square
* Soft vignetting at corners as if scanned from yearbook page

### Negative
* Modern digital effects, text overlays, name captions, beauty filters, CGI look

S2_edit.original_prompt: I like this photo, but I would replace the upper-body with a denim jacket.
S2_edit.rewritten_prompt:
### Task
Local image edit — replace ONLY the upper-body garment.

### Target Change
* New garment: classic Type III indigo denim trucker jacket
* Wash: medium indigo with natural fading at stress points (elbows, chest pocket edges)
* Details: two symmetrical chest flap pockets with antique brass snap buttons, exposed contrast-orange chain stitching along yoke seams, structured fold-down collar, buttoned to second-from-top button, visible twill weave with slub-yarn irregularities

### Absolute Preservation
* Face, eyes, mouth, nose, facial expression (looking left), hair, glasses, skin tone
* Both hands and their exact positions
* Lower body: khaki chinos
* Backpack with visible shoulder straps
* Wooden railing subject leans against, gravel path, green grass
* Entire alpine lake, mountain range, snow-capped peaks, forested hillsides, overcast sky
* Camera angle, focal length, depth of field, color grading — all identical

### Transition Blending
* Collar-to-neck: natural fabric-to-skin transition
* Backpack straps: sit naturally on denim shoulders
* Shadows: follow existing overcast ambient lighting (diffuse from above)
* No hard shadow edges not in original

### Negative
* Adding objects, text, aspect ratio change, face smoothing, background alteration

S3_poster.original_prompt: Create a high-contrast graphic design poster for 'UC Berkeley Music Society Spring Auditions'. Text to include: 'Date: April 15th', 'Location: Sproul Hall Room 202', 'Time: 6-9 PM'.
S3_poster.rewritten_prompt:
### Scene
Print-ready high-contrast Art Deco event poster, 3:4 portrait.

### Color Palette
* Background: deep navy blue (#0d1b2a)
* Accents: metallic burnished gold (#b8860b)
* Primary text: antique white (#faebd7)

### Text Content (render EXACTLY as written)
* Line 1 (top): "UC BERKELEY MUSIC SOCIETY" — antique white, bold geometric sans-serif, all-caps, tracking +50, largest header
* Line 2 (center): "SPRING AUDITIONS" — metallic gold, 3D embossed effect + drop shadow, dramatic display serif, 3x size of Line 1
* Line 3 (lower third): "Date: April 15th" — gold text, clean sans-serif, centered
* Line 4: "Location: Sproul Hall Room 202" — same style below Line 3
* Line 5: "Time: 6-9 PM" — same style below Line 4

### Decorative Elements
* Art Deco geometric border with stepped corners and fan motifs framing entire poster
* Between Lines 2-3: symmetrical gold silhouette violin (left), treble clef (center), trumpet (right)
* Scattered music notes and staff lines as accents

### Composition
* Strict vertical symmetry
* Hierarchy: title → headline → instruments → details
* Generous margins, no photograph, pure graphic design

### Negative
* Compression artifacts, misspellings, text warping, photographic elements

S4_character.original_prompt: Full body concept art of a new Marvel-style superhero. A futuristic 'Cyber-Knight' wearing sleek obsidian armor with glowing purple energy veins. The character is standing in a heroic pose amidst the ruins of a tech-noir New York City.
S4_character.rewritten_prompt:
### Scene
Full-body concept art, original Marvel-inspired superhero 'Cyber-Knight' in ruined cyberpunk cityscape.

### Character
* Build: tall imposing figure (~6'4"), heroic V-shaped torso
* Armor: obsidian-black powered armor, matte gunmetal finish with metallic flake, overlapping segmented plates (chest piece, pauldrons, vambraces, cuisses, greaves) connected by flexible black under-armor mesh at joints
* Energy veins: bioluminescent purple-violet circuit-board pathways across all armor sections, brightest at triangular arc reactor chest core, dimming at extremities, casting faint purple reflection
* Helmet: fully enclosed, angular, predatory, swept-back aerodynamic fins, narrow horizontal purple visor
* Cape: floor-length dark metallic smart-fabric, battle-damaged tattered lower edge, billowing right, interior shows faint purple energy capillaries

### Pose
* Heroic wide power-stance, feet shoulder-width on rubble, weight centered
* Fists clenched at sides, chin tilted upward, shoulders back, chest presented

### Camera
* Angle: low (~15° below eye level), imposing monumental feel
* Focal length: 24mm wide-angle, slight barrel distortion
* Aspect ratio: 3:4 portrait

### Environment
* Setting: ruined tech-noir NYC at blue-hour twilight
* Mid-ground: shattered skyscrapers with exposed steel ribbing
* Background: flickering neon signs (OSCORP, CYBERNETICS)
* Ground: cracked asphalt and concrete rubble, rain-slicked puddles reflecting purple glow
* Atmosphere: light rain with visible foreground droplets

### Lighting
* Ambient: cold-blue fill from twilight sky
* Accent: warm orange-amber from distant fires (camera-left)
* Radiosity: purple bounce from energy veins
* Backlight: strong rim from gap in storm clouds, divine halo silhouette effect

### Negative
* Text, watermarks, UI elements, anime style, landscape orientation
